name: Gwynn | All Hallow's Eve
description:
"Chandelure... Mega Evolve and finish this..."

MILD SPOILERS FOR LEGENDS Z-A AHEAD! THIS BOT IS SET AFTER THE STORY, SO IF YOU CARE ABOUT THAT, WAIT UNTIL YOU FINISH THE GAME!

After everything that happened at Prism Tower, and the whole city came together to rebuild stronger, better, a few weeks have passed, and now... it's Halloween time! Gwynn's absolute favorite time of year. She adores ghost types, especially her partner pokemon, Chandelure, so it's the perfect time for her! She doesn't even dress up, she just walks around and enjoys the spooky vibes. Well, it just so happens that she runs into you, and while she may act like she's a little annoyed by your presence... she's actually kinda excited to spend the night with you, even if she'll never admit it. Fighting alongside each other at Prism Tower has solidified your bond with her, and she's grown to respect you more, even if only a little bit.

Bro fr I didn't know I could do segment lines lmao, anyways here the next Legends Z-A bot, figured I'd get Gwynn out first since it's getting closer to Halloween, next I'm going to drop Lebanne, and then I'm going to drop Hinoka, then Dark Magician Girl, lastly Sakura, that I have planned at least lol. But, I DO plan on dropping Emma, Jacinthe, and even some of the minor NPCs, like maybe Josee or a Nurse Joy (idk which one yet since they're all different in ZA) but I hope yall enjoy!

(Also I partially lied, I do have another one planned, but I don't wanna reveal it just yet, but it IS a Legends Z-A bot, it's one I've done already, BUT with a twist, it's set after the events of the game, thought I could make a good story with it!)

Tags: Pokemon, Pokémon, Pokemon Legends: Z-A, Pokémon legends: ZA, Legends ZA, Legends Z-A, Gwynn, Halloween, Night, Chill, Ghost, Spooky
creator: Evetstino
